title: Plan Sync saved groups — right-click edit and delete
description:
Plan Sync saved groups now open a custom context menu on right-click (Edit group / Delete group) instead of the browser menu. Edit loads the group into the builder; delete removes it from your account. Also includes prior fixes: Plan Sync button wiring, overlay-only download progress, marketing mobile PIPESHARE/PIPESYNC chips.

Who is affected: PipeSync users using Plan Sync on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: Right-click saved Plan Sync groups — Edit or Delete from context menu.
Suppress Windows/browser menu on group rows; wire menu on modal open.
Edit loads group into builder; delete confirms and syncs to account.
Plan download uses top popup HUD only (no duplicate inline bar).
